programmes.show_description: Master the art of layering with expert tips and stylish essentials. Discover how to create versatile looks for every season and elevate your wardrobe with ease.
Kick start your January with a fabulous wardrobe update! You're cordially invited to join us for an exclusive look at our all of our new fashion offers here at QVC.

Relax in style and comfort with our great range of everyday shoes, including comfy flats, supportive trainers and chic sandals. Tune in now for an hour of casual footwear perfect for your new routine.
Offering great colours, quality fabrics and exciting fashion designs for every woman. Treat yourself and go shopping with Julia Roberts!
Update your wardrobe for the new year with gorgeous Wynne Layers fashion from MarlaWynne, featuring layering pieces, scarves and more to help give every outfit the perfect finishing touch.
Showcasing the fashionable and classic bags created by this international brand, including handbags, rucksacks, travel bags and weekend away bags.
Step out in style in Skechers! Renowned for their on-trend, sporty designs, you can now find their fab shoes at QVC too!
